title: evolvulus nuttallianus
intro: Evolvulus nuttallianus, also known as blue daze, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of the United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Evolvulus nuttallianus include reducing inflammation and pain, treating wounds and skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Evolvulus nuttallianus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to leverage its medicinal properties.
